The remaining gap is coming from supply shape, not cleanup correctness: we don’t have enough good human cases in stale inventory, so cleanup is depending on whole-corpus human generation and that path is still rejecting too much.
That gives us the retroactive “don’t make me review this junk again” behavior without turning cleanup into a giant new subsystem.
